what_matters_in_this_vertical: Visibility in local and tourist-driven search results
Mobile-first experience for visitors searching on the go
Clear display of opening hours, location, and menu
Google Business Profile presence and review accumulation
Low-friction contact and enquiry pathways including click-to-call
likely_customer_intent: Find a cafe nearby while visiting or exploring Westport
Check opening hours before making the trip
View the menu to decide whether to visit
Get directions or confirm the address
Read reviews to assess quality before choosing
commercial_risk_if_unaddressed: With no website and no Google Business listing, Example Cafe is invisible to anyone searching online in or around Westport, including the significant tourist traffic the town attracts. Visitors with no prior knowledge of the business will default to competitors who appear in local search results and Google Maps.
strongest_positioning_angle: Example Cafe is currently absent from every online channel a potential customer would use to find it, and a mobile-first website combined with a Google Business Profile would immediately open the business to local and tourist search traffic it is currently missing entirely.
top_3_outreach_talking_points: Westport attracts a large volume of visitors each year, and the majority will search on their phones for somewhere to eat before making a decision. A Google Business Profile alone, which costs nothing to set up, would put Example Cafe on the map for those searches immediately.

There is currently no website, no Google listing, and no visible online presence for Example Cafe, which means any potential customer searching online has no way to find the business, check the menu, or confirm opening hours before visiting.

A straightforward mobile-first website with the menu, location, hours, and a click-to-call button would give Example Cafe a professional online presence that works around the clock to bring in new footfall from both locals and tourists.
likely_objections: We get enough customers through word of mouth and passing trade
We already have an Instagram or Facebook page so we are covered online
We would not know how to manage a website ourselves
It sounds expensive and we are not sure it would make a difference
recommended_offer_angle: Propose a hospitality starter package that includes Google Business Profile setup as a free immediate first step, followed by a fixed-price mobile-first website covering homepage, menu, location and hours, and a contact page with click-to-call. Position this as a complete foundation package for a business starting from zero online, with ongoing hosting and maintenance included as a simple monthly arrangement.
unknowns_to_clarify: Does the business have any existing social media accounts such as Facebook or Instagram that could be linked and used as credibility signals during the website build?
What is the cafe format in terms of table service, walk-in only, or some reservation capability, as this will determine whether a booking integration is appropriate?
Who is the decision maker for marketing and website investment, and are they the owner or a manager?
Are there any seasonal trading patterns or upcoming events such as summer tourist season or local festivals that could create a timely hook for getting the project started quickly?
